p.t: Sun Belt Conference Football Media Days
p.d:
Covering everything you missed from the college gridiron.
Category: Specials, News;

Junior quarterback Gunner Stockton and the No. 5 Bulldogs host the Thundering Herd. Stockton, a 6-foot-1 junior from Tiger, Ga., took over for the injured Carson Beck and led Georgia to a 22-19 overtime victory over Texas in the 2024 SEC ti

A heavyweight bout in the SEC sees the No. 15 Volunteers (2-0) hosting the No. 6 Bulldogs (2-0). Georgia's 31-17 victory last season was its eighth in a row over Tennessee. Bulldogs tight end Oscar Delp had a pair of TD catches in the 2024

The No. 5 Bulldogs (3-0, 1-0 SEC) take on the No. 17 Crimson Tide (2-1, 0-0). Alabama has won both meetings since Georgia claimed the 2021 title over the Tide. Ryan Williams (ALA) posted 177 receiving yards in last year's 41-34 win.

p.t: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
p.d:
Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.
Category: Sports, Talk Show;

The No. 12 Bulldogs (3-1, 1-1 SEC) try to continue their mastery of the Wildcats (2-2, 0-2) with a 16th straight victory. Georgia tries to bounce back after a 24-21 loss to Alabama. Seth McGowan (UK) boasts 387 rushing yards and seven touch

The No. 10 Bulldogs face the Tigers for the 130th time. Georgia leads the Deep South's Oldest Rivalry 65-56-8 after collecting an eighth straight series victory in 2024. Gunner Stockton created three TDs when Georgia thumped Kentucky 35-14

The No. 5 Rebels (6-0, 3-0 SEC) and No. 9 Bulldogs (5-1, 3-1) play a high-stakes game between the hedges. Ole Miss has won two of the last three meetings after a 28-10 victory in 2024, but Georgia won the last six get-togethers at Sanford S

A storied rivalry sees No. 5 Georgia take on Florida in Jacksonville, Fla. The Bulldogs lead the all-time series 57-44-2, and won each the past four meetings by double-digit margins. Georgia comes off a 43-35 win over then-No. 5 Ole Miss on

No. 5 Georgia (7-1, 5-1) tries to maintain its grip on Mississippi State (5-4, 1-4) in an SEC battle of Bulldogs. Georgia has won five straight meetings, and 14 of the last 15. Mississippi State rallied for a 38-35 victory at Arkansas last

The No. 5 Bulldogs host the No. 10 Longhorns. In 2024, Georgia beat Texas 30-15 in the regular season, and 22-19 in overtime in the SEC title game. Texas held off then-No. 9 Vanderbilt for a fourth straight win Nov. 1. Georgia has won five
